title: Credit Risk Engine with XGBoost & SHAP
description: Built an end-to-end credit default prediction system using real-world lending data with XGBoost classification and SHAP explainability. Engineered financial risk features, developed three-tier borrower risk scoring, and implemented interpretable model outputs to support transparent lending decisions and credit risk analysis.

title: Real-Time Fraud Detection Pipeline
description: Developed a real-time fraud detection pipeline using Random Forest, Isolation Forest, and SMOTE resampling techniques to detect anomalous financial transactions. Simulated streaming transaction data with configurable alert thresholds and evaluated model performance on highly imbalanced datasets.

title: Portfolio Optimizer with Monte Carlo & Black-Scholes
description: Designed a quantitative portfolio optimization system using Markowitz Modern Portfolio Theory, Monte Carlo simulations, and Black-Scholes options pricing. Simulated over 10,000 portfolio scenarios across multiple assets to identify efficient frontier allocations, evaluate portfolio volatility, and analyze derivatives pricing and Greeks.

title: ILS Glide Path & ICAO Geometry
description: Built an Instrument Landing System (ILS) approach simulator based on ICAO Annex 10 standards. Modeled glide slope geometry, CDI deviation behavior, and CAT I decision height assessments to simulate precision approach procedures and runway alignment calculations.

title: Flight Delay Prediction with Causal ML
description: Developed a causal machine learning framework to identify the true impact of weather, NAS congestion, and carrier operations on flight delay probability. Used DoWhy causal DAGs and LightGBM models to separate correlation from causation in aviation operations data.

title: Great Circle Routing & Fuel Optimization
description: Created an aviation route optimization engine using Haversine and Vincenty geodesic calculations to model global flight paths. Integrated wind-corrected fuel burn estimates and ETOPS compliance analysis for long-haul international routing scenarios.

title: RAG Financial Document Analyst
description: Built a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system for financial earnings analysis using FAISS vector search and semantic embeddings. Implemented source-aware retrieval pipelines capable of answering finance-related queries with contextual citations from earnings reports and market data.

title: Recommendation Engine with Implicit Feedback
description: Developed a recommendation engine using Alternating Least Squares (ALS) matrix factorization and implicit feedback modeling. Evaluated ranking performance using NDCG@10 metrics and analyzed popularity bias in collaborative filtering systems.

title: LLM Evaluation & Hallucination Benchmark
description: Designed an LLM benchmarking framework to evaluate hallucination behavior across finance and aviation question-answer datasets. Compared model outputs using ROUGE and BERTScore metrics on expert-verified evaluation prompts.

title: Agentic SQL Analyst with Natural Language Interface
description: Built an AI-powered SQL analytics agent capable of translating natural language questions into validated SQL queries over a DuckDB database containing 15,000+ records. Implemented query verification, analytics workflows, and interactive visualizations for operational datasets.

title: Mechanistic Interpretability of GPT-2 Medium
description: Conducted mechanistic interpretability research on GPT-2 Medium using activation patching and circuit analysis techniques. Investigated the Indirect Object Identification (IOI) circuit to analyze token prediction behavior across transformer layers and measured activation recovery patterns during inference.

title: RLHF Pipeline from Scratch
description: Built a Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipeline from scratch using DistilBERT reward modeling and PPO optimization. Trained reward functions on human preference pairs and implemented KL-penalized policy optimization workflows for alignment-focused fine-tuning experiments.

title: Multi-Agent Conversations with GPT-4o-mini
description: Developed a multi-agent conversational framework using GPT-4o-mini with role-based coordination, shared memory, and dynamic conversation routing. Simulated collaborative agent interactions with fallback handling and context-aware response management.

title: GBM Simulation — SanDisk vs ASML
description: Implemented Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) simulations for equity price forecasting and derivatives pricing using Monte Carlo methods. Applied Itô's Lemma, Black-Scholes modeling, and Greeks analysis to evaluate volatility and option sensitivity across semiconductor market assets.

title: RAG with Chunking + Local Ollama LLM
description: Built a local-first retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline using LangChain, ChromaDB, and Ollama-based LLM inference. Implemented recursive chunking, semantic embeddings, and vector retrieval workflows to support contextual document question answering in both cloud and offline environments.

title: LangGraph Email Triage Agent
description: Developed a stateful LangGraph-based email triage assistant with ReAct-style reasoning, memory persistence, and tool calling capabilities. Built routing workflows for email classification, meeting scheduling, and automated response generation using structured agent orchestration.

title: AI Health & Fitness Assistant
description: Built a multimodal AI health and fitness assistant integrating IBM Watsonx vision models, GPT-based planning systems, and nutrition analysis workflows. Implemented gym equipment recognition, AI-generated workout planning, and food analysis pipelines within a Gradio-powered user interface.

title: Love at First Agent — LangGraph + XGBoost
description: Designed an autonomous machine learning agent using LangGraph and XGBoost to analyze speed dating datasets and predict match probability outcomes. Implemented automated profiling, leakage prevention, recursive feature elimination (RFE), and model evaluation workflows achieving ROC-AUC performance of 0.8553.

title: Weather Data API App
description: Developed a weather analytics application integrating live weather APIs for real-time forecasting, historical trend analysis, and interactive environmental data visualization. Built dynamic dashboards for monitoring temperature, precipitation, and atmospheric conditions.

title: BlackJack to Five — Probability & Optimal Strategy
description: Built a probability and strategy optimization simulator for a custom BlackJack-style game using Monte Carlo methods and dynamic programming. Simulated over 10,000 gameplay iterations to analyze bust probability, expected value outcomes, and optimal decision-making strategies.

title: Grocery Bagger — Bin Packing Optimization
description: Developed a bin packing optimization system comparing First Fit, First Fit Decreasing, and Fragile-First algorithms for grocery bag allocation efficiency. Built a Python-based analytics layer on top of a Java implementation to evaluate packing performance, space utilization, and fragile item handling strategies.

title: DS & AI Interview Prep Agent
description: Built an AI-powered interview preparation platform that analyzes resumes against job descriptions, identifies technical skill gaps, and evaluates interview responses in real time. Integrated GPT-4o-mini scoring workflows across 49 interview questions spanning data science, machine learning, SQL, and behavioral domains.

title: Type 2 Diabetes Risk Predictor
description: Developed a Type 2 diabetes risk prediction model using XGBoost and clinical feature engineering techniques. Built preprocessing pipelines for zero-value imputation, risk stratification, and lifestyle intervention recommendations, achieving ROC-AUC performance of 0.8220 on healthcare datasets.

title: Parkinson's Tremor Detector — Voice Analysis
description: Built a Parkinson’s disease detection system using voice biomarker analysis and machine learning classification models. Processed MDVP jitter, shimmer, HNR, RPDE, and DFA speech features with XGBoost and SVM models, achieving ROC-AUC performance of 0.9828 and 96.6% clinical sensitivity.

title: Anxiety & Isolation Sentiment Tracker
description: Developed a longitudinal mental health sentiment tracking system using zero-shot NLP classification with BART-large-MNLI. Built pipelines to classify anxiety, isolation, depression, and neutral emotional states while simulating 30-day behavioral tracking and weekly psychological trend analysis.

title: PilotGPT v2 — IFR Full Suite
description: Built an AI-powered IFR flight planning assistant designed around FAA flight operations standards. Developed a LangGraph ReAct agent with aviation-specific tools covering holding pattern entries, E6B wind correction calculations, density altitude estimation, and automated IFR flight plan generation.

title: Recipe Maker with Gemma 4 Vision + DALL-E 3
description: Developed a multimodal AI recipe generation pipeline combining computer vision, LLM reasoning, and image generation workflows. Integrated Gemma 4 vision models for ingredient detection, GPT-4o-mini for recipe and nutrition generation, and DALL-E 3 for restaurant-quality food image synthesis.

title: PilotGPT v3 — VFR & IFR Flight Assistant
description: Expanded PilotGPT into a comprehensive VFR and IFR aviation assistant with sectional chart interpretation, VFR weather briefing generation, TFR lookup, and airspace classification analysis. Built a LangGraph ReAct system with aviation-specific tools for real-time pilot assistance workflows.

title: Pilot Credentials Vault
description: Developed a full-stack aviation health management platform for pilots to securely manage FAA credentials, digital logbooks, and medical records. Built secure authentication using JWT and bcryptjs with SQLite-backed storage and a responsive dashboard interface. Integrated a local Ollama LLM with LangGraph agents to summarize medical records, analyze health risks, and perform FAA medical compliance checks.

title: AI Resume & Cover Letter Optimizer
description: Built an AI-powered resume and cover letter optimization platform designed to improve ATS compatibility and streamline job application workflows. Developed NLP-based keyword analysis using NLTK to evaluate resume alignment against job descriptions and integrated GPT-4o-mini to rewrite resume bullet points and generate tailored cover letters. Implemented automated ATS scoring, keyword matching, and DOCX export functionality, improving resume match scores from 22% to 90% during testing.
